message.content:
Explore the src/redux/ folder. Map out:
1. All ducks files and their state shapes
2. Which ducks are still being used vs already migrated to Zustand
3. Any Redux-Saga watchers
4. Connection between Redux ducks and screens

This helps understand what legacy code still needs attention.

content.text: I'll explore the Redux folder structure and analyze the legacy code systematically.
